_comment: Stage 1.5 runtime baseline captured 2026-05-09. AI_GENERATE_MODE=sharded smoke against WIPRO-SOC L2 with count=8. The structural baseline (baseline.json) captures golden-question scoring; this file captures live runtime characteristics so future runs can detect regressions in latency / RSS / chunk-success rates.

scenario.failure: submit_questions tool call arrived after the 300000ms timeout had killed the subprocess

known_gaps: RESOLVED (2026-05-09b) — Per-type generation timeout was 60 + count*120 = 300s for count=2, exactly the boundary causing log_analysis and scenario timeouts. Fixed: bumped to 90 + count*180 = 450s for count=2. See DISALLOWED_TOOLS change in claude-code-vps.ts.

RESOLVED (2026-05-09b) — Skills were invoking Skill/ToolSearch tool_use events before submit_questions, burning wall-clock. Fixed: added Skill,ToolSearch to DISALLOWED_TOOLS in claude-code-vps.ts; added Tool-use policy section to all 4 generate-* SKILL.md files (version 2026-05-09b).

RESOLVED (2026-05-09) — Subjective fold-into-mcq removed. generate-subjective skill shipped (prompts/skills/generate-subjective/SKILL.md). TYPE_SKILL_MAP in claude-code-vps.ts now includes subjective→generate-subjective. sharded path typeEntries covers all 5 types.

RESOLVED (2026-05-09c) — Citation regression: model was returning external IDs (mitre.t1558.003, T1003.001) in knowledge_base_source_ids instead of verbatim source.id values. Fixed: Source-citation contract (HARD RULE) section added to all 5 generate-* SKILL.md files; versions bumped to 2026-05-09c.

L2_count_8._note: count=8 at L2 now allocates ~1 subjective chunk (Stage 1.5+, generate-subjective skill active).

regression_thresholds._comment: Future smoke runs must beat or match these. Update only via a deliberate baseline refresh commit.
